projects.name: HangarAI
projects.organization: yconic Hackathon Winner – Advanced AI track
projects.description: A multimodal AI platform guiding early-stage founders from raw idea to investor-ready pitch.
projects.longDescription: Built a multimodal AI platform that guides early-stage founders from raw idea to investor-ready pitch, designing a LangGraph orchestrated agent with Gemini API for ideation, market-aware assumption challenges, and Startup Manifest extraction. Developed a multi-agent pitch analysis pipeline using asyncio that concurrently processes vocal emotion (Hume AI prosody via WebSocket), visual presence (MediaPipe Tasks Vision), and speech transcript (Deepgram) into an investor-personalized feedback report across a FastAPI, React, and PostgreSQL stack, achieving <10s latency for a 2-minute pitch.
highlights: Multimodal pitch analysis: vocal, visual, and speech

projects.name: CalmAI
projects.description: An iOS mental wellness app that passively detects vocal distress and provides guided CBT/DBT interventions.
projects.longDescription: Built an iOS mental wellness app using SwiftUI that passively detects vocal distress via a real-time audio pipeline streamed over WebSocket to a FastAPI backend. Analyzed using Hume AI's speech prosody model and automatically notifies users with guided CBT (Cognitive Behavioral Therapy) and DBT (Dialectical Behavior Therapy) interventions.
highlights: Real-time vocal distress detection via Hume AI speech prosody
WebSocket audio pipeline from iOS to FastAPI backend
Automated CBT and DBT intervention delivery

projects.name: DonnaAI
projects.description: A voice-powered AI productivity assistant that automates agentic workflows across Outlook, Calendar, and OneNote.
projects.longDescription: Built a voice-activated AI agent using Python (FastAPI) and the Claude API, applying prompt engineering and implementing MCP (Model Context Protocol) to automate agentic workflows across Outlook, Outlook Calendar, and OneNote via an iOS app (SwiftUI) and an OMI wearable device for hands-free, real-time voice command processing. Implemented RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) using Pinecone vector database for contextual memory storage and retrieval, enabling the assistant to personalize responses across sessions with <200ms retrieval latency.
highlights: MCP integration for multi-service orchestration across Outlook and OneNote
Real-time voice command processing via OMI wearable
<200ms retrieval latency with Pinecone vector database

projects.name: Music Recommender System
projects.description: A lyrics-based music recommendation system using NLP and machine learning techniques.
projects.longDescription: Built a lyrics-based recommender using HuggingFace SBERT (Sentence Transformers) embeddings, artist metadata, and audio features, training a Nearest Neighbors model achieving a mean similarity score of 0.878. Developed a Flask REST API to perform inference with trained models for song recommendations, integrated the Spotify API for song metadata, and designed the UI with React (TypeScript), delivering a complete end-to-end ML + full-stack solution.
highlights: Mean similarity score of 0.878 with Nearest Neighbors model
Spotify API integration for song metadata

projects.name: AI Chatbot SaaS Platform
projects.description: A secure and scalable AI chatbot SaaS application with real-time conversations.
projects.longDescription: Built a secure and scalable AI chatbot SaaS application using the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) and TypeScript. Integrated OpenAI's API for real-time chatbot interactions, storing user sessions and chats in MongoDB. Implemented JWT-based user authentication and authorization, securing API access with HTTP-only cookies.

projects.name: Credit Card Lead Prediction
projects.description: ML model to predict potential credit card applicants for optimized marketing strategies.
projects.longDescription: Predicted potential credit card applicants to optimize marketing strategies and enhance customer acquisition. Conducted data pre-processing, modeling, validation, and exploratory data analysis. Handled class imbalance using SMOTE (Synthetic Minority Oversampling Technique). Trained Decision Tree, Random Forest, and XGBoost models, achieving 0.88 accuracy and 0.91 precision with XGBoost.
